2603.14841.title: Real-Time Driver Safety Scoring Through Inverse Crash Probability Modeling
2603.14841.paper_summary: Road crashes remain a leading cause of preventable fatalities. Existing prediction models predominantly produce binary outcomes, which offer limited actionable insights for real-time driver feedback. These approaches often lack continuous risk quantification, interpretability, and explicit consideration of vulnerable road users (VRUs), such as pedestrians and cyclists. This research introduces SafeDriver-IQ, a framework that transforms binary crash classifiers into continuous 0-100 safety scores by combining national crash statistics with naturalistic driving data from autonomous vehicles. The framework fuses National Highway Traffic Safety Administration (NHTSA) crash records with Waymo Open Motion Dataset scenarios, engineers domain-informed features, and incorporates a calibration layer grounded in transportation safety literature. Evaluation across 15 complementary analyses indicates that the framework reliably differentiates high-risk from low-risk driving conditions with strong discriminative performance. Findings further reveal that 87% of crashes involve multiple co-occurring risk factors, with non-linear compounding effects that increase the risk to 4.5x baseline. SafeDriver-IQ delivers proactive, explainable safety intelligence relevant to advanced driver-assistance systems (ADAS), fleet management, and urban infrastructure planning. This framework shifts the focus from reactive crash counting to real-time risk prevention.
2603.14841.paper_summary_zh: 道路事故仍然是可預防死亡的主要原因。現有的預測模型主要產生二元結果，這對於實時駕駛者反饋提供的可操作見解有限。這些方法通常缺乏連續的風險量化、可解釋性，並且未明確考慮脆弱道路使用者（VRUs），如行人和騎自行車者。本研究介紹了SafeDriver-IQ，一個將二元事故分類器轉換為連續0-100安全分數的框架，通過將國家事故統計數據與自動駕駛車輛的自然駕駛數據相結合。該框架融合了國家公路交通安全管理局（NHTSA）的事故記錄與Waymo開放運動數據集場景，工程師設計的領域知識特徵，並納入了一個基於交通安全文獻的校準層。對15項互補分析的評估表明，該框架可靠地區分高風險與低風險的駕駛條件，並展現出強大的區分性能。研究結果進一步顯示，87%的事故涉及多個同時存在的風險因素，並具有非線性複合效應，將風險提高至基線的4.5倍。SafeDriver-IQ提供了主動、可解釋的安全情報，與先進駕駛輔助系統（ADAS）、車隊管理和城市基礎設施規劃相關。該框架將重點從反應性事故統計轉向實時風險預防。
2603.14841.author: Joyjit Roy et.al.
